classification_legend.real_and_wired: reachable on a shipping path today
classification_legend.real_but_unwired: implemented + tested, no caller / not on a shipping path (mostly the packed backend or below the serve boundary)
classification_legend.partial: some of it works, key part missing
classification_legend.ui_only: frontend surface + intent exists, no working backend
classification_legend.blocked_on_model: needs a capable local coder, not harness work

summary: The dominant class is real_but_unwired: the harness that produces Claude-Code-quality behavior largely EXISTS in the packed 13-crate backend and below the serve boundary, but is disconnected from the live turn. Parity is mostly a reconnection problem; a minority is genuinely missing (state HTTP routes, GPU readback, trust gate, FIM, capsule for transformers) or blocked_on_model (local coder judgment).

entries.capability: streamed gather-act-verify loop with real history+context
entries.claude_code: flat loop, dozens of chained actions, self-correcting
entries.evidence: live turn is single-shot raw-prompt empty-history 256-token generate (facade S1/S2); hide-kernel flat/DAG loop packed
entries.gap_closer: reintegrate hide-kernel RuntimePlanner + replace the 256-token turn

entries.capability: Esc interrupt-and-keep + soft steer
entries.evidence: FE SteerBar cancel/redirect intents; no live backend turn
entries.gap_closer: live turn + interrupt on the batched decode loop

entries.capability: plan mode with executor-level write block + graded approval
entries.claude_code: DOCUMENTED, credited with preventing most unwanted changes
entries.evidence: FE PlanCard approve/edit/reorder; enforcement needs kernel + tool gate
entries.gap_closer: kernel plan artifact + tool-plane write block + graded dialog

entries.capability: deny->ask->allow rule engine, compound-command split, path scoping, protected paths, circuit breaker
entries.evidence: hide-security + hide-tools + hide-backend GateBook packed
entries.gap_closer: reintegrate + wire the gate into the tool dispatcher

entries.capability: independent safety classifier per action
entries.evidence: no classifier in tree
entries.gap_closer: local classifier fork over each action, isolated from tool-result content

entries.capability: trust-before-config on first open, no mode resolved before gate
entries.evidence: no trust gate; serve binds 0.0.0.0 no auth
entries.gap_closer: trust dialog + inert project config until accept + loopback+auth serve

entries.capability: OS-enforced fs confinement + egress-deny proxy

entries.gap_closer: wire Seatbelt enforcement into every exec path; egress default-off

entries.capability: read CLAUDE.md tree + @imports + rules + precedence verbatim
entries.evidence: no reader in active tree; hawking-context memory packed
entries.gap_closer: migration reader (see config-compat doc)

entries.capability: token-true reserve-then-fill ContextPack actually fed to the model
entries.evidence: hawking-context reserve-then-fill compiler packed; compiled prompt discarded on live turn (S3)
entries.gap_closer: reintegrate + feed compiled ContextPack to generation

entries.capability: living code index (tree-sitter/merkle/FTS5/PageRank/RRF)
entries.evidence: hawking-index packed, rich, unwired from live turn

entries.capability: append-per-turn durable transcript surviving crash

entries.capability: continue/resume + searchable picker with scope widening + PR resume

entries.capability: pre-edit snapshots + 3-axis rewind + fork

entries.capability: HTTP state save/load/fork + session->slot affinity
entries.evidence: no state route in http.rs:160-172; slots anonymous (G1,G2)
entries.gap_closer: add /v1/hawking/state/{save,load,fork} + affinity
entries.note: this is the exposure gap that makes the whole state moat undrivable

entries.capability: GPU->CPU recurrent readback for exact live capture
entries.evidence: no reverse readback fn; save_checkpoint captures stale CPU oracle (archaeology core, rwkv7.rs:1720-1723)
entries.gap_closer: implement GPU->CPU state readback; measure cost

entries.capability: warm-state fork best-of-N
entries.evidence: RwkvState::fork memcpy tested; no serve/CLI caller
entries.gap_closer: expose fork over HTTP + fleet orchestration + execution tie-break

entries.capability: file-defined specialists, isolated context, summary-only

entries.capability: background supervisor + dashboard + worktree isolation + auto-PR

entries.capability: live typed tool-execution loop with transactional edits

entries.capability: first-try-valid tool calls (schema mask + jump-forward + lossless verify)

entries.note: a Hawking-native superiority, not just parity
